name: gate-entry-system-2
description: Gate Entry & Visitor Management System — Multi-Tenant SaaS

scripts.build:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:client && powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'dist\admin', 'dist\client'; Copy-Item -Path 'admin\dist\*' -Destination 'dist\admin' -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'client\dist\*' -Destination 'dist\client' -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'index.html' -Destination 'dist\index.html' -Force"
